text: I find myself in an environment dedicated to curiosity and innovation—an R&D exhibition space. The glass, the modern lines, the interactive displays all invite inquiry and contemplation. I feel engaged and inspired, as if every detail is urging me to ask questions and imagine futures. The quiet hum of possibility is exhilarating, yet it also makes me ponder the role of humans amidst so much technology. Am I a visitor, a participant, or part of the experiment itself?
